steps.title: Identify quantities of each pan size
steps.content:
From the problem statement:
  • Number of 9-inch pans = $n$ (the given variable)
  • Number of 10-inch pans = $4n$ (four times the 9-inch quantity)
  • Number of 7-inch pans = \$10$ (stated directly)

steps.title: Write and simplify the total equation
steps.content: The manufacturing plant makes 100 pans total, so we add all quantities: $$4n + n + 10 = 100$$ Combining the $n$ terms on the left: $$5n + 10 = 100$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
